metadata.name: Detect Fault in Tunnel Ventilation System

description: A sensor in a traffic tunnel's ventilation system reports a fan malfunction.

nodes.task_description: Receive a 'Fan Failure' alert from the 'Downtown Tunnel' monitoring system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent acknowledges the critical infrastructure alert.

nodes.task_description: Check the air quality sensors within the tunnel to ensure CO levels are still safe.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms that air quality is still within acceptable limits due to redundant fans.

nodes.task_description: Create a high-priority work order for an engineering team to repair the faulty fan.
